family_summary: An eight-year interstate war between Iraq and Iran that began with Iraq's invasion on 1980-09-22 and ended with a UN-brokered ceasefire effective 1988-08-20. The conflict shifted repeatedly between border invasion, urban siege, marsh attrition, amphibious offensives, tanker attacks, and anti-city missile campaigns.
notes: Bundle follows an episode-first approach and avoids war-wide civilian or military denominators except where geography is genuinely broad.
